entity.label: Anim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Fountains, a city in the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:50), now el-Ghuwein, near Eshtemoh, about 10 miles south-west of Hebron.

verses.text: And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,
